meta.title: Prayaan Capital — MSME Loans in South India
meta.description: Fast, fair, and transparent business loans for MSMEs in Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, and Telangana. RBI Registered NBFC.

sections.headline: Empowering MSMEs Across South India
sections.subheadline: Fast, fair, and transparent business loans for micro and small enterprises in Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh and Telangana.

sections.headline: Loan Products Built for MSMEs
sections.subheadline: Two focused product lines — working capital and long-term growth financing

products.title: Secured Business Loans
products.description: For MSMEs in manufacturing, trading, and services — micro and small segment focus.

products.title: LAP-Style Financing
products.description: Long-term loans secured by commercial or residential property.

differentiators.title: Relationship-First
differentiators.body: Dedicated relationship manager for every borrower.

differentiators.title: Simple Documentation
differentiators.body: Minimal paperwork designed for small business owners.

differentiators.title: Semi-urban Expertise
differentiators.body: Deep understanding of Tier 2 and Tier 3 market dynamics.

differentiators.title: Tech-enabled Underwriting
differentiators.body: AI-driven credit assessment for faster decisions.

differentiators.title: Reliable Lender
differentiators.body: Consistent and transparent terms — no hidden charges.

differentiators.title: Reasonable Cost
differentiators.body: Competitive rates benchmarked to market standards.
